name: strength
description: Strength represents physical power. Directly impacts physical damage dealt and, to a minor extent, physical defense.

name: vitality
description: Vitality represents physical endurance and bodily resilience. Directly impacts maximum health and physical defense.

name: agility
description: Agility represents speed, reflexes, and dexterity. Directly impacts combat speed, evasion, and physical accuracy.

name: synergy
description: Synergy represents compatibility and control over internal nanobots. Directly impacts magical damage dealt, magical accuracy, chance of applying status effects, and, to a minor extent, magical defense.

name: resolve
description: Resolve represents internal stability under nanobot strain and hostile nanotech interference. Directly impacts maximum MP, magical defense, MP recovery, and status effect resistance.

name: luck
description: Luck has a direct, albeit subtle, influence on many game aspects, including critical hit rate, item drop rate, rare encounters, and ambush chance.
